creator: ed@FreeBSD.org
text:
A new version of the libspiff port is available. Bump the port and also
update my maintainer email address.

Fix: 

--- multimedia/libspiff/Makefile
+++ multimedia/libspiff/Makefile
@@ -1,16 +1,16 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	libspiff
 # Date Created:				19 Mar 2007
-# Whom:					Ed Schouten <ed@fxq.nl>
+# Whom:					Ed Schouten <ed@FreeBSD.org>
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/multimedia/libspiff/Makefile,v 1.10 2008/02/12 21:42:41 miwi Exp $
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	libspiff
-PORTVERSION=	0.8.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.3
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
-MAINTAINER=	ed@fxq.nl
+MAINTAINER=	ed@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	An XSPF parsing library
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	expat.6:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/expat2 \
--- multimedia/libspiff/distinfo
+++ multimedia/libspiff/distinfo
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (libspiff-0.8.2.tar.bz2) = e6505bdff9048bf61533c00caf48d553
-SHA256 (libspiff-0.8.2.tar.bz2) = 8451c7182a99f0f4a88b3c19234c5182689f91444c50fcb510452b5e5b8a7805
-SIZE (libspiff-0.8.2.tar.bz2) = 506531
+MD5 (libspiff-0.8.3.tar.bz2) = 0f989402e5edcbd84c456be56c856f25
+SHA256 (libspiff-0.8.3.tar.bz2) = 8b4ebd22dcfa7511109c2f6fa9e304c2ef3acaa492d55423cdf9a6f54a2fdb22
+SIZE (libspiff-0.8.3.tar.bz2) = 510030
